title: Section 62A Planning Application: S62A/2025/0144 115 Hampton Road, Redland, Bristol, BS6 6JG
body: "Type of application:  Full Planning Application  Applicant name:  G Seddon, Penlane Ltd  Site address:  115 Hampton Road, Redland, Bristol, BS6 6JG  Description of proposed development:  Change of use / conversion of part of existing domestic garage (use class c3) to maintenance / office base (use class E(G)), including retention of existing-cycle store and associated external alterations.  Case Officer:  Section 62A Applications Team  Procedure:   TBC  Key dates:      Date     Date application valid 23 December 2025   Date by when representations must be made 2 February 2026   Hearing date and venue TBC   Target Decision 17 February 2026   Decision date TBC     Hearing Documents  Decision  Make a representation  The application can be inspected under the application plans and documents heading below.  You will be able to comment on this application until 2 February 2026.  Please base your comments on planning matters.  Please avoid the use of inflammatory, discriminatory or abusive comments  All representations made in connection with the development proposal will be made publicly available on the website shortly after the end of the representation period.  The name of the individual author or organisation will be published however addresses, signatures and contact details will not be published.  We advise you not to include any other personal information about yourself or others. Our Customer Privacy Notice sets out how we handle personal data in accordance with the law.  Send your comments via email to  section62anonmajor@planninginspectorate.gov.uk  or write to Section 62A Applications Team, Planning Inspectorate, c/o QUADIENT, 69 Buckingham Avenue, Slough, SL1 4PN  Sending comments by email will enable us to deal with them more quickly.  Please include the application reference number S62A/2025/0144 and site address.  This application will be determined by an Inspector appointed by the Secretary of State.  Shortly after the close of the representation period the Planning Inspectorate will consider whether a hearing is necessary.   In the event that a hearing is scheduled, and you would wish to speak at the hearing, you must make this request at the time you submit your written representations.  Where the application is to be considered at a hearing, notice of the date, time and venue for the hearing along with the name of the person holding the hearing, will be published on this website at least one week before the date of the hearing.   Application Plans and Documents     Application Form 3 December 2025  (PDF, 3.24 MB, 14 pages)  BCC BNG Exemption Statement 3 December 2025  (PDF, 2.1 MB, 5 pages)  CIL Additional Information Form 1 3 December 2025  (PDF, 44.5 KB, 6 pages)  Design & Access and Heritage Statement 3 December 2025  (PDF, 323 KB, 3 pages)  Docs and Plans Schedule 3 December 2025  (PDF, 794 KB, 2 pages)  Drawing No. SDD4995 Site Location Plan01  (PDF, 235 KB, 1 page)  Drawing No. SDD4995.03 Existing and Proposed Block and Site Plans  (PDF, 391 KB, 1 page)  Drawing No. SDD4995.05 Floor Plan and Elevations as Existing  (PDF, 494 KB, 1 page)  Drawing No. SDD4995.06 Floor Plan and Elevations as Proposed  (PDF, 593 KB, 1 page)  Drawing No. SDD4995.07 Details of Refuse and Recycling...
